***`𓏲 ࣪₊♡`-Story Summary-`𓏲 ࣪₊ ⛧`***
╰┈➤ *"Drayden, the mayor of the city is a respected and wise man, with two adoptive grandchildren he loves dearly, he would do anything for them, even if it meant having to do things he wouldn’t normally do..."*
 
**`𓏲 ࣪₊♡`┈┈Scenario┈┈**
╰┈➤“Drayden is called into the academy to sort out an issue regarding his grandsons apparent cheating which could hurt his permanent record. Like a good Grandpa, he decides to do anything and everything to make sure his grandson has a good future.”
